edits.why: Marcia's role_in_scene_being ruling (Principle A consolidation, 2026-06-13): near-synonym scene-roles merged to their cluster survivor. The deceased cluster collapsed 5→1 (DECEASED_KIN) — identity stays in the being-id, kinship in the approved HUSBAND/KINSMAN roles, the levirate act in NAME_PRESERVED; the merged values are NOT promoted, the survivors are.
